# PuPageScaffold

## Intent

- page scaffold
- responsive page shell
- full-screen page
- aside page layout
- footer reveal layout

## Prefer When

- Use for page-level structure across document pages, full-screen flows, centered flows, responsive aside layouts, and reveal-footer pages.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for small local sections inside a page; use cards, sections, or normal layout utilities instead.

## Import

```ts
import { PuPageScaffold } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

## Props

- `viewport`
- `layout`
- `width`
- `contentPlacement`
- `footerPlacement`
- `padding`
- `stickyAside`

## Slots

- `default`
- `aside`
- `footer`
- `header`

## Events

- No emitted events extracted.

## Composition

- PuPageHeader
- PuScrollView
- PuForm
- PuCard

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/layout/PuPageScaffold.story.vue`

- Document
- Centered Screen
- No Padding
- Aside Layout
- Narrow Container
- Footer Reveal

## Types

- `PuPageScaffoldContentPlacement`
- `PuPageScaffoldFooterPlacement`
- `PuPageScaffoldLayout`
- `PuPageScaffoldPadding`
- `PuPageScaffoldViewport`
- `PuPageScaffoldWidth`

## Caveats

- Use padding with the shared PuSpacing vocabulary for scaffold-owned page inset control; padding none removes design padding and safe-area inset.
